title: S&R VDE Insulated Diagonal Side Cutter 160mm – 1000V Rated Wire Cutting Pliers | VDE-Tested for Electrical Work
features: 🔩 Professional Electrical Wire Cutting: Designed for electrical installation work, safely cutting cables and wires under 1000V, tested and certified to VDE standards
⚡ Cuts Medium & Hard Wire: Sharp, hardened cutting edges handle medium-hard wire up to Ø 2.3mm and hard wire up to Ø 1.5mm, with high leverage for effortless cutting
🛠️ Durable Chrome-Vanadium Steel: Made from high-strength Cr-V steel with a phosphated and galvanic-coated surface for maximum durability and corrosion resistance
🔧 Ergonomic & Insulated Handles: 2-component anti-slip grips provide comfortable, secure handling, ensuring precision and safety during prolonged use
📏 Compact & Heavy-Duty: Measuring 160mm in length, with 21mm jaws and a lightweight 214g build, ideal for manual and engineering work
description: Product Description S&R Industriewerkzeuge is a leading German tool company committed to offer high-performance and industrial quality products. For Repairs, Maintenance and Installation Work The high-quality S&R VDE power side cutters with secured protection up to 1,000 volts are ideal for repairs, maintenance work and installations by enabling precise, powerful and safe cutting. Ideal for electricians & electrical engineers! The soft-touch two-component handle simplifies handling, while the induction-hardened 60-CrV steel enables robust and simple operation. Overall length: 160 mm, jaw length: 24 mm, weight: 214 g Phosphatized surface, galvanic coating Cutting up to Ø 2.3 mm for medium hard wire and Ø 1.5 mm for hard wire Extra-hardened cutting edge for precise and easy cutting For universal usage, e.g. in car workshops, assembly and maintenance work German VDE 1000V certification The S&R Plier has a VDE insulation. VDE is the certification of German electricians. The insulation ensures safe operation up to 1,000 volts. ✔ Handy Grips The practical anti-slip protection makes it possible to hold the cutters safely. Additional grooves provide a stronger hold. The ergonomic shape also ensures a more effective power transmission. ✔ Safe and Reliable The power side cutters with VDE insulation ensure safe working up to 1,000 volts. The integrated protective insulation helps to work safely even in areas that are difficult to access. ✔ Precise and Strong Cutting The precisely-grounded blades allow for effective cutting of cables and wires. Due to the additional inductive hardening, the cutting edges are extra tough to reduce wear and tear and to increase load capacity. ✔ The Most Bang for Your Buck Ideal for powerful cutting of medium-hard wire up to Ø 2.3 mm and hard wire up to Ø 1.5 mm. Professional standards and high-quality materials meet reliable performance.
